trip.name: Orlando: The Wizarding World

legs.accommodation: TBD — Hotel/Airbnb near Universal Orlando Resort

flights.notes: Check Southwest, Frontier, Spirit for budget options. ~2.5hr direct possible.

budget.note: Budget TBD — tickets, hotel, flights, food, and spending all need pricing.

costComparison.title: Ticket Deal Breakdown
costComparison.note: Why the Buy 3, Get 2 Free deal wins

summary.verdict: Groupon saves $110+ vs Universal direct, $268 vs standard 5-day ticket

trip.vibe: Theme park adventure — Epic Universe, Wizarding World of Harry Potter, Islands of Adventure. Group trip with personal solo ticket.

days.title: Arrival Day
activities: Pick up rental car or arrange transport
Rest up for park days ahead
days.notes: Universal is about 15 min from MCO airport. Stay near International Drive for convenience.

days.title: 🎢 Epic Universe Day 1
activities: The Wizarding World — Ministry of Magic (Paris-themed!)
How to Train Your Dragon — Isle of Berk
days.notes: Epic Universe is the NEW park. Arrive early — rope drop recommended. This is what you came for.

days.title: 🎬 Universal Studios Florida
activities: Ride Hogwarts Express to Islands of Adventure
days.notes: Park-to-Park access lets you ride the Hogwarts Express between parks!

days.title: ⚡ Islands of Adventure
activities: Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey
days.notes: Hagrid's has the longest waits — ride it first thing or use Single Rider line.

days.title: 🎢 Epic Universe Day 2
activities: Return to Epic Universe for anything missed
Catch any shows or experiences skipped Day 1
days.notes: Second day lets you go deeper without rushing. Take your time.

days.title: 🏖️ Rest Day
days.notes: Theme parks are exhausting. Rest days prevent burnout.

days.title: 🌊 Water Park Day
activities: Volcano Bay water park (if upgrade purchased)
Wave pool, lazy river, water slides
Relax and cool off from the theme parks
days.notes: August in Florida = HOT. Water park is perfect mid-trip.

days.title: 🛍️ Shopping & Explore
activities: Visit a local brewery or restaurant
Pack any purchases to ship home if needed
days.notes: CityWalk is free to enter — just pay for parking. Good for evening vibes.

days.title: 🎢 Park Day — Your Pick
activities: Return to any park you want to revisit
Or try something new in Orlando
Or: just relax by the pool
days.notes: Your trip, your rules. Do what feels right.

days.title: 🏖️ Chill Day
activities: No park tickets left — enjoy Orlando
Explore Winter Park (charming area, shops + restaurants)
days.notes: Winter Park has Park Avenue — walkable shops and restaurants.

days.title: Last Full Day
activities: Final grocery/Target run for travel snacks
days.notes: Don't forget to check for anything left behind.

days.title: Departure Day
activities: Return rental car or arrange transport to MCO
days.notes: MCO is easy to navigate. Allow 2 hours before flight.

checklist.item: Pack light clothes — August is HOT (90°F+)

parks.name: Universal Epic Universe
parks.note: The NEW park — 5 themed worlds including Wizarding World Paris

parks.name: Universal Studios Florida
parks.note: Diagon Alley, Transformers, Mummy, Men in Black

parks.name: Volcano Bay
parks.note: Water park with TapuTapu virtual queue

shops.name: Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes
shops.note: Diagon Alley — joke shop, Fred & George vibes

shops.name: Honeydukes
shops.note: Hogsmeade — chocolate frog cards, Bertie Bott's

shops.name: Universal's Superstar Store
shops.note: CityWalk — all the merch in one place

explore.name: Universal CityWalk
explore.note: Free entry — restaurants, bars, shops, entertainment

explore.name: ICON Park
explore.note: The Wheel, Madame Tussauds, Sea Life Aquarium

packing.item: Rain poncho or small umbrella (afternoon storms daily)
Refillable water bottle (free ice water at quick-service restaurants)
Small backpack or sling bag for park days
Gryffindor/Harry Potter merch to wear (optional but fun!)

tips: ⚡ Buy tickets via Groupon NOW — the Buy 3 Get 2 Free deal ends Aug 26, 2026
🏰 Hogwarts Express requires Park-to-Park access — Base tickets can't ride it
🎢 Hagrid's Motorbike Adventure has the longest waits — ride it at rope drop or use Single Rider
🧊 Free ice water at any quick-service restaurant — just ask. Don't buy bottled water.
📱 Download the Universal Orlando app — real-time wait times, mobile food ordering, park map
☔ August = daily afternoon thunderstorms. They pass quickly. Wear a poncho, keep riding.
🏃 Single Rider lines can cut wait times by 50%+ — great if you don't need to sit together
🎢 Volcano Bay uses TapuTapu wristbands — virtual queue system, no rushing needed
🍽️ Three Broomsticks and Leaky Cauldron are the best themed restaurants — worth the wait
🧳 Your 5-day ticket must be used within 7 consecutive days — plan your park days carefully
💡 The Groupon deal gives you 5 days of park access for ~$51/day — best value available
